title: Senior Software Engineer - Cyient Capital India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Cyient Capital India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Cyient Capital India has an exciting opening for a Senior Software Engineer at our Gwalior office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Cyient Capital India:
Cyient Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cyient Capital India!
